title: Cinematic Custom Hairstyle Editorial Poster AI
sourceTitle: Cinematic Custom Hairstyle Editorial Poster AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Ultra-luxury cinematic custom hairstyle editorial poster for adult East Asian woman with oval face, clear skin, elegant cinematic presence, with dominant magazine title HAIR ATLAS. Subject: adult East Asian woman with oval face, clear skin, elegant cinematic presence is analyzed as the central beauty or fashion subject, with face shape, jawline, bone structure, eye shape, skin tone, forehead ratio, hair volume, neckline, personal aura, luxury identity, and cinematic presence guiding six customized hairstyle options. Scene: High-end beauty magazine poster environment with organic geometric composition, flowing asymmetric divisions, curved architectural frames, circular modules, editorial white space, and natural visual rhythm. Composition: Fixed luxury beauty-poster layout: HAIR ATLAS appears huge and dominant at the top or integrated into the composition, six distinct hairstyle panels surround or flow around the central subject, with soft champagne-gold serif masthead and premium magazine spacing. Signature Elements: adult East Asian woman with oval face, clear skin, elegant cinematic presence, HAIR ATLAS, six customized non-repeating hairstyle options, face-shape-aware design, organic geometric layout, circular frames, flowing asymmetry, champagne-gold masthead, and couture beauty-magazine finish. Fixed source details: Hairstyle System: six face-shape-aware couture hairstyles with soft waves, sleek updo, sculpted bob, airy long layers, editorial wet look, and romantic side part. Style: Ultra-luxury cinematic hairstyle editorial campaign, high-fashion beauty magazine aesthetic, custom couture hair design, soft geometric transitions, premium print layout, and not a simple collage. Color Palette: Champagne gold typography, soft metallic gold highlights, luxurious neutral beauty tones, skin-true color handling, elegant shadows, and refined editorial contrast. Lighting: Cinematic beauty lighting with soft facial modeling, glossy hair highlights, gentle rim light, and premium studio-magazine glow across all hairstyle panels. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Typography: HAIR ATLAS must appear exactly, large, clear, visually dominant, in an elegant luxury Serif style with soft metallic champagne-gold texture; Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。

imagePrompts.title: Cinematic Custom Hairstyle Editorial Poster Variant 02

prompt: Theme: Ultra-luxury cinematic custom hairstyle editorial poster for adult East Asian woman with oval face, clear skin, elegant cinematic presence, with dominant magazine title HAIR ATLAS. Subject: adult East Asian woman with oval face, clear skin, elegant cinematic presence is analyzed as the central beauty or fashion subject, with face shape, jawline, bone structure, eye shape, skin tone, forehead ratio, hair volume, neckline, personal aura, luxury identity, and cinematic presence guiding six customized hairstyle options. Scene: High-end beauty magazine poster environment with organic geometric composition, flowing asymmetric divisions, curved architectural frames, circular modules, editorial white space, and natural visual rhythm. Composition: Fixed luxury beauty-poster layout: HAIR ATLAS appears huge and dominant at the top or integrated into the composition, six distinct hairstyle panels surround or flow around the central subject, with soft champagne-gold serif masthead and premium magazine spacing. Signature Elements: adult East Asian woman with oval face, clear skin, elegant cinematic presence, HAIR ATLAS, six customized non-repeating hairstyle options, face-shape-aware design, organic geometric layout, circular frames, flowing asymmetry, champagne-gold masthead, and couture beauty-magazine finish. Fixed source details: Hairstyle System: six face-shape-aware couture hairstyles with soft waves, sleek updo, sculpted bob, airy long layers, editorial wet look, and romantic side part. Style: Ultra-luxury cinematic hairstyle editorial campaign, high-fashion beauty magazine aesthetic, custom couture hair design, soft geometric transitions, premium print layout, and not a simple collage. Color Palette: Champagne gold typography, soft metallic gold highlights, luxurious neutral beauty tones, skin-true color handling, elegant shadows, and refined editorial contrast. Lighting: Cinematic beauty lighting with soft facial modeling, glossy hair highlights, gentle rim light, and premium studio-magazine glow across all hairstyle panels. Camera: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Typography: HAIR ATLAS must appear exactly, large, clear, visually dominant, in an elegant luxury Serif style with soft metallic champagne-gold texture; Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
